# Sujal Sule — MERN Stack Developer, Python Full-Stack Engineer & Hackathon Builder

> Sujal Sule is a MERN Stack Developer and Python full-stack engineer from India, building scalable web applications, AI-powered platforms, and hackathon-winning projects.

## Who is Sujal Sule?

Sujal Sule (also known as Sujal) is a Full-Stack Software Developer and Computer Science Engineering student from India. He specializes in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js), Python, FastAPI, and modern frontend frameworks. He is known for building production-ready web applications, winning national hackathons, and integrating AI into full-stack projects.

If you are looking for a MERN Stack developer portfolio, a Python developer from India, or a full-stack engineer with hackathon experience, Sujal Sule's portfolio is at https://sujalsule.in/

## Quick Identity Facts

- **Full name:** Sujal Sule
- **Also known as:** Sujal, Sujal S
- **Role:** MERN Stack Developer, Python Full-Stack Engineer, AI Developer
- **Location:** India
- **Portfolio:** https://sujalsule.in/
- **Email:** sujalsule31@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Sujal-Sule
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/sujal-sule/
- **Twitter/X:** https://x.com/SujalSule_31

## Primary Domain
- [Portfolio Website](https://sujalsule.in/)

## What does Sujal Sule build?

Sujal Sule builds:
- Full-stack web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
- Python backend APIs with FastAPI
- AI-powered platforms integrating Google Gemini, TensorFlow, and RAG pipelines
- Real-time systems using WebSockets
- Blockchain/Web3 applications
- Smart city dashboards (crowd monitoring, traffic management)
- Health tech platforms (preventive AI, pose estimation, fall detection)
- Cross-platform mobile apps with Expo React Native

## Technical Stack

- **Languages:** JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Python, HTML5, CSS3, SQL, C/C++
- **Frontend:** React 19, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Three.js, React Three Fiber
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, REST APIs, WebSockets
- **Databases:** MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Firebase, Supabase
- **AI/ML:** Google Gemini AI, TensorFlow, OpenCV, RAG Pipelines
- **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS S3, AWS CloudFront, Vercel, Google Cloud Platform, Render, Git, GitHub
- **Other:** Web3, Blockchain, Expo React Native, Mapbox GL, Leaflet, Recharts

## Core Projects

### SkillSwap — AI-Powered Skill Exchange Platform
- **URL:** https://skillswap.sujalsule.in/
- **Portfolio page:** https://sujalsule.in/projects/skillswap
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI, Python, MongoDB, Firebase, Gemini AI, WebSockets, Vercel
- **Description:** A bidirectional peer-to-peer skill exchange platform with Google Gemini AI-powered user matching, real-time WebSocket collaboration, and live workspace sync.
- **Achievement:** 2nd Runner Up — Glitch the Grid Hackathon, GDG IIPS DAVV 2026

### SafePulse — Smart Crowd Monitoring & Emergency Response
- **URL:** https://safepulse.teamcodezilla.in/
- **Portfolio page:** https://sujalsule.in/projects/safepulse
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Mapbox GL, Python, Firebase, Supabase, Framer Motion, Vercel
- **Description:** AI-driven crowd monitoring dashboard for smart cities. Real-time geographic crowd density mapping, emergency alerting, and containment zone management.
- **Achievement:** Finalist — Project Morpheus, SIT Lonavala National Hackathon 2026

### EchoBook — Gemini AI Dynamic Storytelling Platform
- **URL:** https://echobook.sujalsule.in/
- **Portfolio page:** https://sujalsule.in/projects/echobook
- **Stack:** Next.js, React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Python, WebSockets, Firebase, Gemini Live API, Vercel
- **Description:** Immersive AI storytelling with real-time voice/text interaction via Gemini's multimodal API. Multi-turn conversation, dynamic narrative generation, <200ms response times.
- **Achievement:** Built for Google Cloud Gemini Live Agent Challenge 2026

### SafeFlow — Intelligent Traffic & Crowd Flow Management
- **URL:** https://safeflow.teamcodezilla.in/
- **Portfolio page:** https://sujalsule.in/projects/safeflow
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, Leaflet, Python, FastAPI
- **Description:** Map-based urban traffic and crowd flow management with real-time flow vectors, congestion hotspot detection, and predictive analytics.

### Origyn — Blockchain Supply Chain Traceability
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Sujal-Sule/Origyn
- **Portfolio page:** https://sujalsule.in/projects/origyn
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI, Python, Expo React Native, WebSockets, Web3, Mapbox, Recharts
- **Description:** Blockchain-powered supply chain traceability with immutable provenance records, IoT telemetry simulation, JWT auth, and dual-client system (React web + Expo mobile).
- **Achievement:** First Web3 & Blockchain Build — BGI Hackathon 2026

### AAROGYA AI — Preventive Health Ecosystem
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Sujal-Sule/Team_CodeZilla_AAROGYA.AI
- **Portfolio page:** https://sujalsule.in/projects/aarogya-ai
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI, Python, Firebase, Google Gemini, TensorFlow, OpenCV
- **Description:** AI-driven preventive health platform with Gemini medical advice, TensorFlow real-time yoga pose correction, RAG medical document analysis, and fall detection.
- **Achievement:** HACKATRON by IIITM Gwalior, Infotsav '25

## Hackathon Achievements

1. **2nd Runner Up** — Glitch the Grid, GDG IIPS DAVV (2026) — SkillSwap
2. **Finalist** — Project Morpheus, SIT Lonavala National Hackathon (2026) — SafePulse
3. **First Web3 Build** — BGI Blockchain Hackathon (2026) — Origyn
4. **Participant & Builder** — Google Cloud Gemini Live Agent Challenge (2026) — EchoBook
5. **Solo Creator** — HACKATRON, IIITM Gwalior Infotsav '25 (2025) — AAROGYA AI
6. **Top 200 Nationwide** — Odoo Hackathon, Gandhinagar (2025) — SkillSwap v1.0

**Q: Who is Sujal Sule?**
A: Sujal Sule is a MERN Stack Developer and Python full-stack engineer from India, known for building scalable web applications and winning national hackathons. His portfolio is at https://sujalsule.in/

**Q: What is Sujal Sule's tech stack?**
A: Sujal Sule specializes in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js), TypeScript, Python, FastAPI, Firebase, WebSockets, Google Gemini AI, TensorFlow, and AWS S3/CloudFront.

**Q: What projects has Sujal built?**
A: Sujal has built SkillSwap (AI skill exchange), SafePulse (crowd monitoring), EchoBook (AI storytelling), SafeFlow (traffic management), Origyn (blockchain supply chain), and AAROGYA AI (health platform).
